response:
I want 10 weaknesses of a company from 2023, and I want the 10 points to be similar to this example:  
1. [Company Name]'s earnings fell [X]% from [Year] to [Year].  
2. [Company Name]'s EPS dropped [$X] in [Year] from the previous year.  
3. [Company Name]'s share prices dropped [X]% from [Year] to [Year].  
4. Entirely dependent on demand for a single product or service.  
5. Total liabilities increased from [$X] to [$X] from [Year] to [Year].  
6. [Company Name] produced [X]% fewer units of its main product in the first half of [Year] due to weak demand from a key industry sector.  
7. [Competitor Name] achieved [X]% growth in [specific product or service], while [Company Name] has no such offerings.  
8. [Competitor Name] achieved [X]% of its facilities meeting [specific standard or goal] by [Year], while [Company Name] has not met this standard.  
9. Sales to [Company Name]'s top ten customers represented approximately [X]% of their net sales during [Year].  
10. [Company Name] faces multiple pending lawsuits in [Year], from [type of legal issue] to [another type of legal issue].
